today.addOrSample: Add something or try a sample task
today.quietDay: Quiet day — that's okay too. Rest counts.
today.moveFromNext: {{count}} task waiting in Next — pick one →

quickCapture.placeholder: Add a task, reminder, or meeting...
quickCapture.hint: Try typing 'meeting with Roma tomorrow at 3pm' — it'll auto-detect the type, date, and time

welcome.step1Body: No deadlines, no guilt. MindShift works with your brain, not against it.
welcome.step2Body: Add a task → start a focus session → watch your progress grow. That's it.
welcome.step3Body: One task today is enough. Tap the input above to add your first one.

tasks.title: Your Tasks

poolGuide.title: How tasks work here
poolGuide.now: up to 3 tasks you do right now. Less choice = less paralysis.
poolGuide.next: queued up. Move here when ready.
poolGuide.someday: parked ideas. No pressure, no deadline.

tasks.addToStart: Add a task to start focusing
tasks.noPressure: No pressure — tap to set new dates when you're ready
tasks.energyHint: Low energy day? Start with an easy one — momentum builds from small wins.
tasks.queueHere: Queue tasks here — they'll be ready when NOW has room.

focus.title: Focus Session
focus.pickUpWhere: PICK UP WHERE YOU LEFT OFF
focus.focusRoomHint: Focus with a friend — create a room and share the code. You'll see each other's progress.
focus.focusedFor: You've been focused for {{min}}m. Your progress will be saved.
focus.parkProgressDesc: What were you working on? We'll remind you next time.
focus.twoHoursDesc: That's a serious session. Your brain consolidates everything during rest — even 10 minutes away will help you do better next time.
focus.letMeKeepGoing: I know — let me keep going
focus.pickATask: Pick a task to focus on — it gives your session direction.
focus.surpriseDesc: Timer ends when it ends — just focus. No digits, no arc.
focus.arcTimerSurprise: Focus timer — digits hidden in flow phase
focus.arcTimerHideDigits: Focus timer — tap to hide digits
focus.arcTimerShowDigits: Focus timer — tap to show digits
focus.soundMutedHint: Volume is at 0 — adjust in Settings → Sound
focus.focusRoomsHint: Focus with a friend — create a room and share the code. You'll see each other's progress.
focus.softStopToast: You've been going for 90 minutes — wrap up when ready 🌿
focus.closingHighShort: Short sessions count. Your brain needed a break, and you listened.
focus.closingHighFlow: You found your flow despite the noise. That takes real strength.
focus.closingHighDefault: You showed up and did the work. Let your mind settle now.
focus.closingSteadyFlow: Flow reached. Good session. Rest up.
focus.closingSteadyDefault: Session done. Take a beat before the next one.
focus.closingDefault: Session done. Let your mind settle before the next one.
focus.energyCheckIn: How do you feel after that session?
focus.tapToSeeSomeday: Tap to see them in Someday
focus.recoveryDesc: You just did 90 minutes of deep focus. Your brain consolidates learning during rest — even a short break helps.
focus.tipTimeOften: Time slips fast for you — one visible timer is enough.
focus.tipTimeSometimes: Check the clock before you start — then forget about it.
focus.tipEmotionHigh: Block your first 15 min from interruptions. Start small.
focus.tipEmotionModerate: If distracted, pause and return. That counts too.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lightComingSoon: Light theme coming soon — dark mode is best for ADHD focus
settings.targetMinutes: Target minutes of focused work per day
settings.telegramDesc: Send tasks to MindShift from Telegram. Just message the bot and your tasks appear here.
settings.telegramHowTo: You'll get a code to send to @MindShiftBot on Telegram
settings.calendarDesc: Meetings and reminders with dates appear in Google Calendar
settings.focusBlocks: Add focus sessions as time blocks
settings.focusBlocksDesc: Focus sessions will show as teal blocks in your calendar
settings.signInForCalendar: Sign in with Google to sync meetings and reminders
settings.crisisTitle: If you or someone you know is struggling
settings.soundPreviewHint: Tap to preview · Press 🔒 to set as focus anchor
settings.remindersBlocked: Blocked by browser — enable in browser settings to get due-date nudges.
settings.iosInstallDesc: iPhone Safari can't send notifications from a browser tab. Tap the share button → "Add to Home Screen", then open MindShift from there.
settings.medHighlights: Highlights your optimal focus window on the Focus screen
settings.exportSignedIn: Export is available for signed-in users
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteError: Could not delete account. Try again later.

onboarding.refreshing: Refreshing your profile — changes apply immediately
onboarding.oneThingDesc: Just need to focus on one task right now
onboarding.timerPref: How do you want to see your timer?
onboarding.countdownDesc: Classic timer counting down to zero
onboarding.countUpDesc: See how long you can stay in flow
onboarding.surpriseDesc: Random — you'll focus until it rings
onboarding.timeSubtitle: There's no wrong answer — this helps us personalise your timer.
onboarding.timeVanishesDesc: An hour can feel like five minutes
onboarding.timeNaturalDesc: I usually know how long things take
onboarding.plansSubtitle: How you respond helps us support you better on tough days.
onboarding.throwsOffDesc: Hard to refocus — RSD can hit hard
onboarding.recoverDesc: Some friction, but I bounce back
onboarding.remindersSubtitle: We'll nudge you before tasks are due — nothing aggressive, just friendly taps.
onboarding.remindersEnabledDesc: We'll give you a gentle nudge before each due task.
onboarding.noWorriesDesc: You can enable reminders later in Settings.
onboarding.readyDesc: Mochi's here when you need focus. Add your first task to get started.

auth.enterEmailDesc: Enter your email and we'll send a magic link.
auth.noAccount: No account? We'll create one automatically
auth.tapLink: Tap the link in the email to sign in instantly.
auth.linkSent: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}
auth.consentFirst: Agree to the terms first — tap the checkbox above
auth.checkSpam: Check your spam folder if you don't see it within a minute.

appShell.sessionRunning: Your focus session is still running 🌱

mochi.signInForMochi: Sign in so Mochi can learn your patterns and give personalized tips.
mochi.crisisAppNote: I'm just an app, but real people are ready to help right now.

transition.allDone: All done for now. Nice work.

home.tapToAdd: Tap to add your first task — just one is enough
home.lowEnergyDetected: Low energy detected — showing only what matters most.
home.hardWork: You've been working hard. Take care of yourself first.
home.easyDoesIt: Easy does it today. Small steps still count.
home.goalReachedToast: Daily goal reached! {{min}} min focused today
home.briefTimeOften: Time blindness day? Set one visible timer before you start.
home.briefTimeSometimes: Check the clock before diving in — surprises are harder to handle today.
home.briefEmotionHigh: High-reactivity mode: protect your first 30 min from interruptions.
home.briefEmotionModerate: Start slow today. Emotions affect focus more than usual.
home.briefMedMorning: Morning window — good time for harder tasks.
home.briefDefault: Pick one task you'd regret not starting. Just one.

progress.title: Your Progress 🌱
progress.subtitle: Every step counts, no matter how small.
progress.completeToTrack: Complete a focus session to track your trend
progress.mostProductiveTime: Your most productive time this week
progress.insightOneStep: 🎯 You finish tasks one step at a time
progress.achieverDesc: You dive deep and finish what you start
progress.explorerDesc: You thrive on variety and follow curiosity
progress.plannerDesc: You focus best with a predictable rhythm

history.title: Session Log 📋
history.subtitle: Last 30 days of focus
history.signInTitle: Sign in to see your history
history.signInDesc: Your sessions are saved to the cloud when you're logged in.
history.noSessionsDesc: Start your first focus session to see it here.
history.noFilterResults: No sessions with that phase yet

calendar.addDueDate: Add a due date when creating a task.

addTask.title: Add a task
addTask.aiFilled: AI filled in the details — adjust if needed
addTask.notePlaceholder: Any extra detail, links, or context…
addTask.nowFullNext: NOW is full — landing in NEXT
addTask.queueFull: Your queue is getting full — maybe park one before adding?
addTask.crisisMessage: You're not alone. These feelings are real, and help is available.

focusRoom.title: Focus with someone
focusRoom.description: Focus alongside someone else. You'll see their phase in real time — no chat, no distraction, just presence.
focusRoom.enterCode: Enter the 4-char code your partner shared:
focusRoom.waitingForSomeone: Waiting for someone to join… share your code
focusRoom.checkInternet: Check your internet connection and try again.
focusRoom.partnerSteppedAway: Your partner stepped away — keep going

shutdown.openedApp: Opening this app was a step forward
shutdown.waitingInNext: It'll be waiting in NEXT when you wake up.
shutdown.goodnightRest: Rest is productive too. See you tomorrow.
shutdown.goodnightCounted: Today counted. Even the messy parts.
shutdown.goodnightSleep: Tomorrow is already set. Sleep well.

monthly.whatYouBuilt: Here is what you built last month
monthly.welcomeNewMonth: Welcome to a new month. Before you dive in, let's take one breath.
monthly.prevMonthQuote: "{{month}} happened. You were in it. That counts."
monthly.whatFeel: What do you want this month to feel like?
monthly.closingNewPage: New month. Same you, new page.

weekly.consistentDesc: Show up every day, even briefly
weekly.challengeDesc: Push my edge a little further
weekly.skipDecide: Skip — I'll decide as I go
weekly.intentionVisible: You'll see this when you start a focus session.
weekly.recapDefault: Each finished task is one less thing on your mind.

recovery.overwhelmQuestion: How overwhelmed are you right now?
recovery.oneThingLabel: What's the ONE thing that matters most right now?
recovery.orPickEasy: Or pick something easy to start with:
recovery.microWinWrite: Write down 3 things on my mind
recovery.archivedTasks: {{count}} old task moved to Someday. You can review them anytime.
recovery.archivedTasksPlural: {{count}} old tasks moved to Someday. You can review them anytime.

contextRestore.allCaughtUp: You're all caught up — ready for what's next?

install.installBenefits: Works offline · No browser bar · Full screen
install.opensLikeApp: . Opens like a real app — no browser bar.

burnout.pushingHard: You have been pushing hard. Rest is part of the process, not a failure.
burnout.buildingTension: Your recent patterns suggest building tension. Consider shorter sessions.

genZ.recoveryWelcome: you came back — that's the whole point 💜
genZ.lowEnergyNudge: low battery mode — one thing is enough 🌿

millennial.streakBreak: streak paused — pick up when ready
millennial.recoveryWelcome: welcome back — pick up where you left off
millennial.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
millennial.lowEnergyNudge: Easy day — one thing is enough 🌿

genX.recoveryWelcome: Welcome back. Ready when you are.
genX.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
genX.lowEnergyNudge: Light day — one task is enough.

tutorial.introBody: A quick 2-minute session to see how MindShift works. Your brain goes through natural phases — we'll show you each one.
tutorial.introHint: Takes 2 minutes. You can skip anytime.
tutorial.struggleExplain: This is normal. Your brain is warming up. The first 30 seconds are always the hardest.
tutorial.releaseExplain: The resistance is lifting. Your brain is settling into the task.
tutorial.flowExplain: You're in flow. This is deep focus. It gets easier the longer you stay.
tutorial.celebrateBody: That was a real focus session. Here's what your brain just went through:
tutorial.struggleDesc: Your brain resists starting. This is ADHD — not laziness. It passes.
tutorial.releaseDesc: Resistance fades. Your brain starts to engage with the task.
tutorial.flowDesc: Deep focus. Your brain found its groove. This is the goal.
tutorial.nextBody: You've seen how focus works in MindShift. Here's what to try next:
tutorial.tip1: Add your own tasks to the NOW pool
tutorial.tip2: Try longer sessions (15-25 min) with sound
tutorial.tip3: Check your progress after a few sessions

reminders.oneHour: "{{title}}" is coming up in about an hour
reminders.overdue: "{{title}}" was due recently. Still want to do it?

achievements.five_min_hero_desc: Start a task using the 5-minute rule
achievements.comeback_kid_desc: Return after 3+ days and complete a task
achievements.gentle_start_desc: Complete a task at low energy (1-2)
achievements.recover_rise_desc: Come back after a break and focus
achievements.pool_shifter_desc: Move a task from Someday to Now
achievements.full_cycle_desc: Complete all 4 focus phases in one session

appMode.minimalSubtitle: One task at a time. What matters most?
appMode.habitSubtitle: Build your routine, one step at a time.
